base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of victory_pose — a character from 1987 final fantasy. Post-battle victory pose (fist raised) per class. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Post-battle victory pose (fist raised) per class
